dialog.message:
@"
RoboDog,
Thank you so much for coming at such short notice! I appreciate your efforts to reach out to us quickly. We've been using all available resources efficiently but can't go any further without some assistance from the rescue team. Could you please consider bringing the spinal board? It would be invaluable in helping one of our survivors who has a spinal injury and is currently paralyzed. 

We understand that moving faster may not be possible due to the nature of this situation, but every moment saved could mean the difference between life and death. The more time we conserve, the better equipped we'll be to help others. Thank you again for your cooperation.

In return, we'd like to offer you a small token of gratitude—maybe something light and quick to carry. A water bottle or a snack pack would be greatly appreciated."@
